title: PW-WSF-400 Material Standard
description: Official PhysWorldLM World Specification material standard. Engine-independent, physics-aware, scientific and engineering description of every material that can exist in a simulated universe. Every physical object in PhysWorldLM references one or more Material objects.

ScalarSI.description: A scalar engineering value with SI unit, valid range, uncertainty, and standard reference.

value.description: Numerical value in specified SI unit.

temperature_k.description: Temperature at which value was measured, Kelvin.

pressure_pa.description: Pressure at which value was measured, Pa.

standard_ref.description: Measurement standard, e.g. ASTM E8, ISO 6892.

MaterialIdentity.description: Identity, provenance, and governance metadata for a material.

parent_material_id.description: UUID of the base material this is derived from.

MaterialComposition.description: Chemical and elemental composition of the material.

PhysicalProperties.description: Fundamental physical properties: density, porosity, moisture.

density_kg_m3.description: Mass density, kg/m³. ASTM B311 / ISO 1183.

bulk_density_kg_m3.description: Bulk (apparent) density for granular materials, kg/m³.

MechanicalProperties.description: Engineering mechanical properties per ASTM/ISO standards.

youngs_modulus_pa.description: Young's (elastic) modulus, Pa. ASTM E111 / ISO 6892-1.

yield_strength_pa.description: 0.2% proof stress (tensile yield), Pa. ASTM E8.

fracture_toughness_pa_m05.description: Plane-strain fracture toughness KIc, Pa·√m. ASTM E399.

impact_energy_j.description: Charpy impact energy, J. ASTM E23 / ISO 148-1.

specific_heat_capacity_j_kg_k.description: Specific heat capacity at constant pressure Cp, J/(kg·K). ASTM E1269.

thermal_conductivity_w_m_k.description: Thermal conductivity λ, W/(m·K). ASTM E1461.

thermal_expansion_per_k.description: Coefficient of thermal expansion α, /K. ASTM E228.

glass_transition_k.description: Tg for polymers and glasses, K.

electrical_conductivity_s_m.description: Electrical conductivity σ, S/m. ASTM B193.

OpticalProperties.description: Optical and photonic material properties across the electromagnetic spectrum.

refractive_index.description: Real part of complex refractive index n at 550nm.

extinction_coefficient.description: Imaginary part k of complex refractive index.

ElectromagneticProperties.description: Radar, RF, microwave, and stealth material properties.

radar_cross_section_m2.description: Monostatic RCS at reference frequency, m².

radar_absorptivity.description: Fraction of incident radar energy absorbed.

acoustic_impedance_pa_s_m.description: Specific acoustic impedance Z = ρ·c, Pa·s/m = rayl.

ChemicalProperties.description: Chemical reactivity, stability, and environmental compatibility.

GeologicalSoilProperties.description: Geological and geotechnical properties — for soils, rocks, and geological materials.

FluidProperties.description: Properties for fluid materials: water, fuel, oil, gas, plasma.

FireExplosionBehaviour.description: Combustion, fire spread, and explosion behaviour.

BallisticBehaviour.description: Ballistic protection and terminal effects properties.

hugoniot_params.description: Shock Hugoniot fit: Us = c0 + s·Up

SensorBehaviour.description: Material interaction signatures for all sensor modalities.

gnss_transparent.description: True if material is transparent to GNSS signals.

AIMetadata.description: Semantic AI metadata for knowledge graph integration and language-model reasoning.

embedding_vector.description: Dense semantic embedding for nearest-neighbor retrieval.

ManufacturingInfo.description: Manufacturing process, quality, and traceability metadata.

surface_finish_ra_m.description: Arithmetic mean surface roughness Ra, meters.

SimulationParameters.description: Hints and parameters for physics engine simulation backends.

RenderingMetadata.description: Optional interoperability references for rendering pipelines. Descriptive only — not authoritative material definition.

CompatibilityLayer.description: Compatibility hints for specific simulation and rendering engines.

SurfaceProperties.description: Surface physics: friction, roughness, and interface properties.

DegradationProperties.description: Long-term degradation, aging, corrosion, and weathering.

NuclearRadiationProperties.description: Nuclear and radiation properties for CBRN simulation.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Complete PW-WSF-400 material specification. Engine-independent scientific and engineering description of a material for PhysWorldLM.

extensions.description: Domain extension fields using reverse-DNS keys.
